brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (read) with valid inheritance reasoning; only one level of analysis — states what without exploring why inheritance applies or chain implications; no self-monitoring or reflection on reasoning process; no verification or sanity checks performed; presents conclusion as certain with no acknowledgment of assumptions or edge cases; considers only one explanation with no alternatives evaluated; shows the key derivation step (no explicit perms → inherit parent → Others=read) but skips setup verification of the full permission chain
